name: Reflex Plus Kitten Food Canned - Chicken Chunks in Loaf Pate 400g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Full-balanced, chicken protein-containing canned (wet) cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all breeds.
description: Reflex Plus Chicken Kitten Canned Food , fully-balanced, chicken protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 7.0 Crude Fiber (%) -?0.5 Moisture (%) - 80 Crude Ash (%) - 2.0 Vitamin A (Min) - 1650 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 210 IE/kg Iron - 9.6 mg/kg Copper - 1.4 mg/kg Iodine - 0.24 mg/kg Manganese - 1.8 mg/kg Zinc - 9.5 mg/kg Selenium - 0.025 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and Animal Derivatives (Chicken 4% min.), Minerals, Cassia Gum (2200 mg/kg), Preservatives and Colourants. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: Weaning food at 3 months: 2/3 can in 2 or 3 meals | 4-5 months: 1 can in 2 meals | 6-10 months: 1 can in 2 meals. The individual needs depends on factors like age, breed or activity. Serve at room temperature.
